title: Product Page Content

fields.label: Section visibility
fields.instructions: Turn individual sections on or off for this product. Everything is shown by default. The hero and the buy configurator are always shown.

fields.label: Hero
fields.instructions: Top of the product page. The category line (e.g. "Summerhouse") and "from" price are derived automatically — these fields are the surrounding copy.

fields.label: Hero eyebrow
fields.name: hero_eyebrow
fields.instructions: Small label above the headline, e.g. "Composite · Fully insulated". The category name is prepended automatically.

fields.label: Hero heading
fields.name: hero_heading
fields.instructions: Main headline. Line breaks are preserved.
fields.placeholder: Work happens at the bottom of the garden.

fields.label: Hero lead paragraph
fields.name: hero_lead
fields.instructions: One-sentence intro under the headline.

fields.label: Hero image
fields.name: hero_image
fields.instructions: Falls back to the product's featured image if left empty.

fields.label: Product image
fields.instructions: Extra product images for this page.

fields.label: Configurator
fields.instructions: Copy around the live buy configurator. The options, price and sizes stay API-driven.

fields.label: Configurator heading
fields.name: configurator_heading
fields.instructions: Heading above the option steps. Leave blank to auto-use “Build your {category}.”

fields.label: “Configure” button label
fields.name: configure_cta_label
fields.instructions: The button under “What’s included” that jumps to the configurator. Leave blank to auto-use “Configure your {category}”. The → arrow is added automatically.

fields.label: Configurator — description
fields.name: cfg_description
fields.instructions: The “Description” accordion in the configurator preview. Leave blank to use the product’s WooCommerce short description, then a default.

fields.label: Configurator — key features
fields.name: cfg_key_features
fields.instructions: The “Key features” list in the configurator preview. Use the editor’s bullet-list button. Leave blank to use the default list.

fields.label: Showcase video URL
fields.name: showcase_video_url
fields.instructions: "Watch the showcase" link (YouTube, etc.).

fields.label: Highlight cards
fields.name: highlights
fields.instructions: The image rail. Add each highlight card.

fields.label: Heading
fields.name: included_heading
fields.default_value: Everything you need, in one delivery.

fields.label: Included items
fields.name: included_items
fields.instructions: Each ticked line in the "what's included" list.

fields.label: Eyebrow
fields.name: why_eyebrow
fields.instructions: e.g. "Why the Summerhouse" — category name appended automatically if left as "Why the".

fields.label: Feature sections
fields.instructions: The alternating image / copy sections (Image & text (2-col), Cladding, Built to last, Assembly, Large image with card).

fields.label: Feature: image & text (2 col) — eyebrow
fields.name: insulation_eyebrow
fields.instructions: Small label above the heading. Leave blank to use “Insulation”.

fields.label: Cladding — video URL
fields.name: cladding_video_url
fields.instructions: Background video (.mp4) for the immersive cladding section.

fields.label: Heading
fields.name: mk_heading
fields.default_value: Configure it around how you'll use it.

sub_fields.label: Link (optional)
sub_fields.name: link
sub_fields.instructions: e.g. a colour-options video. Leave empty for a plain card.

fields.label: Final CTA heading
fields.name: final_heading
fields.default_value:
Your office is
ready when you are.

fields.label: Buy-button label
fields.name: cta_button_label
fields.instructions: Text on the "Customise & buy" buttons.

description: Editable marketing content for the single-product (PDP) template. The configurator, price, sizes and spec values remain API-driven; these fields fill the surrounding copy, images and sections.
